items.title: Little Shark Learns Big Words
items.targetType: Solana educational communities, crypto learning groups
items.draftText: What is a 'wallet'? Tralalerito hear big frens talk. Is it a cozy cave for special seashells? 🥺🐚 Help tiny shark understand! *Wiggle wiggle*
items.targetAngle: Beginner crypto education, basic Solana concepts for new learners
items.riskCheck: Ensures questions are simple, avoids financial topics, maintains innocent persona.

items.title: Splashing in Creative Pools
items.targetType: Solana art/meme communities, creative challenge groups (non-NFT focused)
items.draftText: Ooh! Tralalerito see so many pretty colors here! Can I make a tiny splashy drawing too? What your favorite thing to imagine? Tralalerito loves drawing little fishy friends! So much fun!
items.targetAngle: Engaging with art/meme communities by expressing desire to participate in creative fun.
items.riskCheck: Ensure focus remains on community's creative output and Tralalerito's participation, not promoting $TRALALA or asking for specific engagement metrics.
